titles.title: Breathe On Me, Breath of God

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Breathe on me, Breath of God, Fill me with life a new, That I may love what Thou dost love, And do what Thou wouldst do.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Breathe on me, Breath of God, Until my heart is pure, Until with Thee my will Thy will, To do and to endure.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Breathe on me, Breath of God Till I am wholly Thine, Till all this earthly part of me, Glows with Thy Fire Divine.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Breathe on me, Breath of God, So shall I never die, But live with Thee the perfect Life Of Thine Eternity.
